name: Transylvanian Nosh
recipeIngredient: 1 small loaf of country white bread
1/4 lb Russian-style feta cheese, cut into 2-inch pieces
8 tiny dill pickles or gherkins, cut into halves lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread into half-inch-thick slices.
2. Cut each slice in half to get 16 total slices.
3. Cut each salami slice into thirds.
4. Spread butter evenly on one side of each bread slice.
5. Place 2 pieces of salami on each bread slice.
6. Add 1 egg slice at the center of each sandwich, followed by 1 piece of feta cheese, 1 half pickle, and 2 halves of olives.
7. Sprinkle Jarlsberg cheese over the toppings.
8. Arrange the sandwiches on a platter.
Makes about 16 slices or 8 servings.
